text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nice Nature has been acting strange all day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like when I passed the academy gates on my way
into work...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait. This is not a good idea.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Isn't waiting at the gate in the morning a bit
much?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: My easy plan is backfiring... I guess I have to—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, heeey, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What a coincidence meeting you here... Seriously,
what are the odds?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Umm, we have training this evening, right? See
you then!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Let's get it! ...What am I saying? Haha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, she abruptly came into my office at lunch...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, so, uh... here's the thing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um... I have something I'd like to give you...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yes. It's... it's...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's fried chicken!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The butcher at the shopping district gave me
some extra.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's the perfect snack to go with a drink, right?
You should take some home.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll give it to you later...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's okay, I still have time. Just keep it simple...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, while we were taking a break during
training...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, not in a tracksuit. Never mind.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna get some water...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And now...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Here's okay. Thanks for your hard work today.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: W-waaaait!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, so...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You forgot your chicken!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The chicken I was supposed to give you! One sec,
I'll go get it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Gah! I'm such a coward!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Nice Nature gives me some fried chicken,
but it also comes with a pack of homemade
chocolates labeled "A special bonus."

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haven't you forgot something?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: No, not... I mean, you're not wrong, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I mean... Urghhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Here...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if they're any good but... here.
Valentine's Day chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nothing weird about this, right?! I'm just
expressing my gratitude to my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's always taught me that showing
gratitude is important.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So even though they're just normal chocolates, I
still figured I should—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: No... I want to give you these. That's why I made them.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I say that, but all I did was cut up some
chocolate and melt it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You probably aren't too excited to get them from
me, though...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: C-come on! Why are you quiet?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You're making me look stupid... Come on, say
something...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Do you really mean that?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You're not just saying it to make me feel better?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chocolates Nice Nature gave me taste extra
sweet.
